body_txt: A character keeps as a pet what would normally be considered (and the same species may be in every other instance) a bloodthirsty monster. Such a creature may be given a deceptive name . A person with such a pet may be a Fluffy Tamer , if not The Beastmaster . May be a Team Pet . Extremely prone to Fluffy the Terrible naming conventions. See also Mon and Unusual Pets for Unusual People . Compare Monster Roommate and Monster Allies . When the monster is much more human-like, see Supporting the Monster Loved One .
